data.title: Fluid Transfer System Market expected to reach $29.95 billion in 2032, with a 3.3% CAGR from $23.93 billion in 2025.
data.description: A recent report by MarketsandMarkets predicts that the Fluid Transfer System Market will see a significant increase, reaching USD 29.95 billion by 2032, up from USD 23.93 billion in 2025, marking a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 3.3%. The market is expected to experience steady growth in the coming years, indicating a positive trend in the industry.

data.title: AECOM and Arup consortium wins place on UK National Highways' SPaTS3 with £495 million potential value over 6 years.
data.description: In Dallas, AECOM (NYSE: ACM) revealed they secured a position on the SPaTS3 framework in the U.K., in partnership with Arup. The framework has a total value nearing £495 million, and it will run for six years with six suppliers participating. It is anticipated to continue until 2031, aiding National Highways in overseeing and enhancing England’s motorway network.

data.title: Timken appoints Lucian Boldea as President and CEO; global technology leader in bearings and motion.
data.description: In North Canton, Ohio on August 25, 2025, The Timken Company, a leading global provider of engineered bearings and industrial motion solutions, declared Lucian Boldea as the new President and CEO, alongside a member of the Board of Directors. Timken, listed on NYSE as TKR and accessible at www.timken.com, focuses on innovative technology in its operations.
GRAYSCALE FILES S-1 FOR AVALANCHE ETF •Grayscale has filed an S-1 with the SEC for its Avalanche Trust (AVAX) to convert into a spot ETF.

data.title: Golf Superstore in Chattanooga integrates Descartes Sellercloud™ with Lightspeed POS to streamline operations and boost efficiency.
data.description: On August 25, 2025, Descartes Systems Group revealed that Golf Superstore in Chattanooga is leveraging Descartes Sellercloud™ in conjunction with its Lightspeed point-of-sale (POS) system. This integration has enabled the store to streamline order and inventory management processes by consolidating operations between its physical store and various online platforms. By utilizing a unified platform for overseeing inventory, orders, fulfillment, and product listings across all sales channels, Golf Superstore has seen a boost in efficiency, better inventory management, and eradication of overselling issues. Descartes Systems Group is recognized as a leading global entity that connects logistics-heavy businesses in the realm of commerce, with its stocks trading on Nasdaq under DSGX and on TSX under DSG.

data.title: Blue Owl and Chirisa Tech Parks announce $4 billion partnership, up to $20 billion investment for 1GW developments.
data.description: Blue Owl Capital has announced the expansion of its development partnership with Chirisa Technology Parks to reach a total investment of $20 billion. This partnership aims to support over 1 gigawatt (GW) of developments. The funds managed by Blue Owl Capital, in collaboration with affiliates of Chirisa Technology Parks (CTP) and Machine Investment, have been working towards this significant investment. The partnership is set to facilitate large-scale projects in Lancaster, Pennsylvania, marking a pivotal moment in sustainable development efforts.

data.title: MPLX LP appoints Ray N. Walker, Jr. to board of directors of MPLX GP LLC, effective immediately.
data.description: In Findlay, Ohio on August 25, 2025, MPLX LP (NYSE: MPLX) revealed that Ray N. Walker, Jr. has been appointed to the board of directors of MPLX GP LLC, the general partner of MPLX. This move is effective immediately. Ray is recognized as a prominent figure in the oil and gas sector.

data.title: JAPAN FLAVOR QUEST by LADDER Inc. introduces snack & culture boxes in the U.S., blending flavor, fun, social impact.
data.description: LADDER Inc., known for its JAPAN FLAVOR QUEST brand, has recently introduced a new series of snack and lifestyle boxes for customers in the United States. This exclusive collection includes a variety of items ranging from classic childhood candies to high-end products. The launch comes amidst growing excitement and anticipation among consumers.

data.description: The anticipated completion date for the arrangement is September 4, 2025.
